Game Highlights

Moments from the field, the dugout, and beyond.

Dust rising on a golden evening — infield in motion

Runner rounding first in the golden hour

Solutions Squad batter mid-follow-through

Relay throw across the infield

Racing for second base

#24 watching the play develop

At the plate — sunset session

Holding it down in the infield

Outfield throw, ball in frame

Tracking it down in center field

Evening warmup — full squad on the field

Wide view — team spread across the diamond

Pitching follow-through, afternoon game

Batting practice — daytime session

Crowd in the stands, game day atmosphere

Walking in ready for game time

SOLUTIONS SQUAD

A casual co-ed softball team bringing competitive spirit and good times to the Bloomington recreational league since 2019. Come out and cheer us on!
